message:
test(fsfs): add benchmark baseline matrix, explanation payload, and profiling harness tests

benchmark_baseline_matrix.rs (346 lines): Test suite validating the
benchmark golden-file infrastructure, baseline matrix construction, and
deterministic comparison workflows for performance regression detection.

explanation_payload_contract.rs (107 lines): Contract tests verifying
FSFS explanation payloads conform to the schema specification, including
confidence ranges, decision rationale structure, and field completeness.

profiling_harness_workflow.rs (130 lines): Workflow tests for the
profiling harness iteration validator, ensuring single-lever optimization
constraints, opportunity matrix construction, and profile kind coverage.

tests/fixtures/benchmark_golden/: Golden reference data for benchmark
baseline comparison tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "fsfs-benchmark-golden-v1",
+  "dataset_version": "2026-02-14",
+  "profile": "small",
+  "corpus": {
+    "files": 5000,
+    "tokens": 1450000,
+    "lines": 230000,
+    "bytes": 18000000
+  },
+  "workload": {
+    "crawl_events": 5200,
+    "index_documents": 5000,
+    "query_cases": 420,
+    "tui_interactions": 640
+  },
+  "baseline_p95_ms": {
+    "crawl": 75,
+    "index": 135,
+    "query": 26,
+    "tui_frame": 14
+  },
+  "notes": [
+    "Mid-size mono-repo profile",
+    "Primary CI comparator for perf drift"
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "fsfs-benchmark-golden-v1",
+  "dataset_version": "2026-02-14",
+  "profile": "tiny",
+  "corpus": {
+    "files": 500,
+    "tokens": 125000,
+    "lines": 18000,
+    "bytes": 1400000
+  },
+  "workload": {
+    "crawl_events": 600,
+    "index_documents": 500,
+    "query_cases": 160,
+    "tui_interactions": 220
+  },
+  "baseline_p95_ms": {
+    "crawl": 18,
+    "index": 42,
+    "query": 14,
+    "tui_frame": 11
+  },
+  "notes": [
+    "Single developer laptop profile",
+    "Used as smoke/regression baseline"
+  ]
+}
